maker_checker: reviews by independent agents (code-reviewer, spec-compliance-auditor); maker did not review own code

findings.summary: empty/whitespace .md files re-reported 'added' on every pass (None != empty set falls through each cycle)
findings.resolution: fixed: 'no chunks on disk and nothing stored' is a no-op; +regression test

findings.summary: set-of-hashes comparison missed a changed file whose distinct-text set was unchanged (duplicate-text chunks), leaving stale chunks
findings.resolution: fixed: per-file fingerprint is {(chunk_index, content_hash)} (count-sensitive); +regression test

findings.summary: watch's broad except also swallows programming errors (infinite quiet loop)
findings.resolution: accepted: the sync spec requires the loop SHALL NOT terminate on a failed pass; broad catch keeps the watcher continuous by design. Failures are logged each tick.

verified_not_bugs: content_hash payload addition is additive; retrieval/answer/eval consumers unaffected; idempotency preserved
add/update/delete classification correct for the ordinary case; delete loop correct when store empty or file reappears
_parse_interval rejects non-numeric/<=0/inf/nan; _wait_for_qdrant closes client and re-raises past deadline
